message:
fix: show card count for Multi-Tenancy dashboard in sidebar (#8842) (#8859)

The Sidebar component renders a per-dashboard card count next to each
sidebar link by looking up the href in `HREF_TO_DASHBOARD_ID`. The map
had every dashboard except Multi-Tenancy, so `DASHBOARD_CONFIGS[dashId]`
returned undefined and the count span rendered nothing for that one
item — exactly the symptom the reporter saw.

Adds the single missing entry `'/multi-tenancy': 'multi-tenancy'`.
Confirmed the dashboard config id in
`web/src/config/dashboards/multi-tenancy.ts` is `'multi-tenancy'`, so
the key matches what `DASHBOARD_CONFIGS` is keyed by.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
